sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str Nullable(String), replaced_str String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'example NULLs in this string', 'example NULLs in this string'), (2, NULL, 'another example');
SELECT id, replaceAll(str, 'NULL', 'not null') AS manipulated_str FROM test_strings WHERE str IS NULL;
SELECT id, replaceAll(str, 'example', 'test') AS replaced_str FROM test_strings WHERE str IS NOT NULL AND str IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num Nullable(UInt32), str Nullable(String)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_numbers VALUES (10, 'replace this'), (NULL, 'replace NULL'), (20, 'replace example');
SELECT num, replaceAll(str, 'replace', 'test') AS new_str FROM test_numbers WHERE num IS NULL OR (num IS NOT NULL AND str IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id UInt32, description Nullable(String), category String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_complex VALUES (1, NULL, 'A'), (2, 'Example', 'B'), (3, 'Another example NULL', 'C');
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_complex WHERE description IS NULL GROUP BY category HAVING count = 1;
SELECT description, replaceAll(description, 'example', 'sample') AS updated_desc FROM test_complex WHERE description IS NULL OR replaceAll(description, 'NULL', 'not null') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, description, replaceAll(str, 'NULL', 'not NULL') FROM (SELECT id, description FROM test_complex WHERE description IS NULL) AS subquery WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, replaceAll(COALESCE(description, ''), 'NULL', 'not null') AS clean_desc FROM test_complex WHERE description IS NOT NULL AND id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_join (a UInt32, b Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, 'one'), (2, 'two'), (3, NULL);
SELECT j.a, replaceAll(j.b, 'two', 'TWO') AS replaced_value FROM test_join AS j JOIN (SELECT id, description FROM test_complex WHERE description IS NOT NULL) AS tc ON j.a = tc.id WHERE j.b IS NULL;
SELECT a, replaceAll(COALESCE(b, 'default'), 'in this', 'out that') AS processed_str FROM test_join WHERE b IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_final (id UInt32, text Nullable(String)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_final VALUES (1, 'replacing is fun'), (2, 'replacing NULL'), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, replaceAll(text, 'replacing', 'changing') AS new_text FROM test_final WHERE text IS NULL OR replaceAll(text, 'NULL', 'not NULL') IS NOT NULL;
